color_scheme.label: Site color mode
color_scheme.info: Only for new users who haven't used the site dark/light mode toggle in the header or are in no-JS mode.

colors_text.label: Text
colors_text.info: Used as foreground color on background colors.

colors_secondary_text.label: Secondary text
colors_secondary_text.info: Used for vendors, old price and some descriptions.

colors_background_overlay.label: Overlay
colors_background_overlay.info: Applied in sections with the overlay opacity setting.

color_interface_elements.label: Some interface elements
color_interface_elements.info: Used for dark mode toggle, free shipping bar, product option on hover.

color_modal_overlay.label: Backdrop base color
color_modal_overlay.info: Choose the background color for the modal overlay. Transparency will be automatically applied.

type_font.label: Font
type_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_header_font_card.label: Heading font
type_header_font_card.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

subtitle_info.content: Used for modal window titles, tags, product vendors.

show_custom_badges.label: Show custom badges
show_custom_badges.info: Need to add a metafield "custom.badges" of type "Single line text" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

new_badge_days.label: Show period of new badge
new_badge_days.info: The number of days is counted from the product publish date.

header__quickadd.info: Settings below apply only to desktop devices.

show_quick_options.label: Show quick options
show_quick_options.info: Options will be unclickable if quick add button is disabled, or if the product is out of stock.

quick_options.label: Quick options
quick_options.info: Each option name must be in its own line. For multiple languages, make sure the option name translation matches the translation used in this setting.

quickadd_show_for_more_options.label: Show choose options state
quickadd_show_for_more_options.info: Shown when all product options can't be set from the product card. Use color swatches and quick options to display all necessary product options on the card.

quickview_show_description.label: Show product description in quick view modal
quickview_show_description.info: Unformatted product description will be shown. Alternatively, you can use the "custom.excerpt" metafield of type "Single line text". [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

quickview_show_on_mobile.label: Show quick view on mobile devices

card_color_swatches_mode.label: Color swatches
card_color_swatches_mode.info: Compact mode shows up to 3 colors.

enable_color_swatch.label: Enable color swatches
enable_color_swatch.info: Color swatches will be shown in the product card, on the product page, and in filters for the option set in "Swatch trigger". The theme supports automatic values from [category metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields).

custom_colors.label: Custom colors
custom_colors.info: Each color must be in its own line, like "Red: #ff0000". You can also use CSS Gradient.

pagination_type.label: Pagination type
pagination_type.info: Pagination type for pages of collections and blogs.

enable_cart_notification.label: Enable cart notification
enable_cart_notification.info: Not available on the cart page.

cart_notification_info.content: Opens to show the product just added to the cart.

enable_cart_drawer.label: Enable cart drawer
enable_cart_drawer.info: Not available on the cart page.

cart_drawer_info.content: Opens when clicking the cart icon in the header. If "Cart notification" is disabled, it opens after an item is added to the cart.

paragraph_empty.content: If no values are specified, default values will be used on the cart page and in the drawer.

collection_empty_cart_drawer.label: Featured collection
collection_empty_cart_drawer.info: Displays when the cart is empty.

header_shipping.info: It is recommended to [create a discount for free shipping](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/discounts/discount-types/free-shipping) or [create a free shipping rate](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/fulfillment/setup/shipping-rates/flat-shipping-rates#create-free-shipping-rates) in the store.

message_shipping.label: Message
message_shipping.info: Use [amount] to display progress towards free shipping.

min_spend.label: Minimum spend for free shipping
min_spend.info: In store currency "Store settings > Store details > Shop currency". Currency conversion will be applied for the customer.

message_shipping_free.label: Success message
message_shipping_free.default: Congratulations! You qualify for free shipping.

save_quick_view.label: Save recently viewed products after quick view

currency_code_enabled.label: Show currency codes
currency_code_enabled.info: Cart and checkout prices always show currency codes. Example: $1.00 USD.

blocks_border_radius.label: Block border radius
blocks_border_radius.info: Applies to some sections where possible.

show_breadcrumbs.label: Enable breadcrumbs
show_breadcrumbs.info: Not applied on the home page and product page.

links_blank.label: Open external links in a new tab
links_blank.info: Applies where the "Open this link in a new window" setting is unavailable, e.g., for the Button link field, menu links, and social media links.

show_quick_add.label: Show quick add block
show_quick_add.info: To work it, the options in "Theme settings > Product card > Quick add" must also be enabled.

show_quick_view.label: Show quick view button
show_quick_view.info: To work it, the option in "Theme settings > Product card > Quick view" must also be enabled.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: To add an underline, select the text and press Ctrl + U for Windows and Linux or Cmd + U for Mac.

aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: When "Adapt to image" option is selected, the aspect ratio applies to the highest image in the blocks.

adapt_to_image.label: Adapt to image
adapt_to_image.info: When "Adapt to image" option is selected, the aspect ratio applies to the highest image in the blocks.

adapt_to_media.label: Adapt to media
adapt_to_media.info: When "Adapt to media" option is selected, the aspect ratio applies to the highest media in the blocks.

image_2.label: Dark mode image
image_2.info: Recommended uploading a dark mode image with the same size as the image.

show_video.label: Show video
show_video.info: If this setting is enabled and a video is selected, the image will not be displayed.

products_per_row_mobile.label: Products per row on mobile devices

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

If the current product isn’t part of any collection, a random product from the store will be shown. Alternatively, you can use the "custom.next_product" metafield of type "Product". [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

main_text.label: Text
main_text.default: Use this space for a short promotional message

link.label: Link
link.info: If set, the entire announcement bar will be clickable.

include_margins.label: Make section margins the same as theme

slide_text.label: Text
slide_text.default: Summarize how many people trust your brand and love your products. Highlight customer satisfaction.

overlay_opacity.info: Will be applied to the both parts.

heading.default: This is where your comparison goes

answer.default: Use this space to give more details about what’s being shown in the blosk — this could be product details, an event highlight, or an introduction to a collection.

text_form.default: If you have any questions feel free to contact us, we promise to get back to you as quickly as we can.

contact_text.label: Text
contact_text.default:
Contact information goes here
for follow-up if necessary

show_socials.label: Show social media icons
show_socials.info: To display the icons, you need to fill in the links in "Theme settings > Social media".

show_newsletter.label: Show newsletter form
show_newsletter.info: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

newsletter_text.label: Additional text
newsletter_text.default: By subscribing, you understand and agree to our Privacy Policy.

enable_country_selector.label: Enable country/region selector
enable_country_selector.info: To add a country/region, go to your [markets settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

enable_language_selector.label: Enable language selector
enable_language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings](/admin/settings/languages).

payment_enable.label: Show payment icons
payment_enable.info: To add payment methods, go to your [payments settings](/admin/settings/payments).

show_policy.label: Show policy links
show_policy.info: To add store policies, go to your [policy settings](/admin/settings/legal).

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: A heading is required to display the menu.

default_open.label: Opened by default on mobile devices

menu.label: Main menu
menu.info: Main menu is displayed in the header on desktop devices and in the drawer menu on mobile devices.

logo_2.label: Dark mode logo image
logo_2.info: Recommended uploading a dark mode logo with the same size as the logo image.

show_dm_logo_in_overlay_mode.label: Show dark mode logo image for overlay mode

enable_country_selector.label: Enable country/region selector
enable_country_selector.info: To add a country/region, go to your [markets settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

enable_language_selector.label: Enable language selector
enable_language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings](/admin/settings/languages).

boxed_mode.label: Enable boxed mode
boxed_mode.info: When it is enabled, if the "Hero", "Media banner", "Slideshow", "Login", "Registration" section is placed first on the page, it will appear under the header.

overlay_mode.label: Enable overlay mode
overlay_mode.info: Applies when the "Hero", "Media banner", "Slideshow", "Login", or "Registration" section is placed first on the page.

header_color_scheme.info: The option will be applied if "Enable overlay mode" is disabled.

enable_social_on_mobile.label: Enable social media links in mobile drawer menu
enable_social_on_mobile.info: To display the icons, you need to fill in the links in "Theme settings > Social media".

search_button_type.label: Button type on desktop
search_button_type.info: Applies to desktop devices. On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

region_button_type.label: Button type on desktop
region_button_type.info: Applies to desktop devices. On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

region_color_scheme.label: Modal color scheme on desktop
region_color_scheme.info: On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

enable_account_modal_component.label: Enable account modal component
enable_account_modal_component.info: If disabled, the account button redirects to login or account page.

account_button_type.label: Button type on desktop
account_button_type.info: On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

enable_additional_button.label: Show additional button
enable_additional_button.info: On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

dark_mode_button_type.label: Button type on desktop
dark_mode_button_type.info: On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

h1_logo.label: Use H1 tag for logo on homepage

account_info.content: The account button is shown when "Show sign-in links" is enabled in Store settings > Customer accounts.

mobile_menu_color_scheme.label: Mobile drawer menu color scheme
mobile_menu_color_scheme.info: Mobile menu drawer appears when the screen width is below 1200px.

show_dm_logo_in_mobile_menu.label: Show dark mode logo image for light mode in mobile drawer menu
show_dm_logo_in_mobile_menu.info: Recommended only for mobile drawer menu color scheme with a dark background.

enable_right_mobile_menu_border.label: Enable right border for mobile menu icon

mega_menu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_menu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the menu link. For multiple languages, make sure the translation of this setting matches the link name entered in the source language.

mega_menu_color_scheme.info: Applies to desktop devices. On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

mega_menu_info.content: If a menu trigger link has a submenu, it will not be displayed and will be replaced with items from this block.

mega_menu_submenu.label: Menu
mega_menu_submenu.info: It is recommended to use a menu with two levels of nesting.

info.content: It is recommended to attach it to the menu item where all second-level items have third-level submenus.

mega_submenu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_submenu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the link with the submenu. For multiple languages, make sure the translation of this setting matches the link name entered in the source language.

mega_menu_color_scheme.info: Applies to desktop devices. On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

burger_main_menu.label: Menu
burger_main_menu.info: It is recommended to use a menu with more than one level of nesting.

enable_clickable_top_level.label: Enable top-level link navigation
enable_clickable_top_level.info: Applies on desktop for links with a submenu.

show_burger_main_on_mobile.label: Show menu on mobile
show_burger_main_on_mobile.info: On mobile devices, menu will appear inside the drawer menu.

burger_enable_social.label: Enable social media links
burger_enable_social.info: To display the links, you need to fill in the links in "Theme settings > Social media".

search_modal_info.content: It opens when the search icon is clicked. The "Enable search" setting must be turned on in the main Header settings.

search_modal_color_scheme.label: Color scheme on desktop
search_modal_color_scheme.info: On mobile devices, it will appear inside the drawer menu.

search_menu.label: Trending searches menu
search_menu.info: The links of this single-level menu will be displayed below the search input.

trigger-open-delay.label: Time delay for a trigger open

trigger-close-delay.label: Time delay for a trigger close

close-scroll-position.label: Close scroll position
close-scroll-position.info: It is recommended that the value be greater than the "Open scroll position".

manual-selector.label: CSS selector for manual trigger
manual-selector.info: If the html element has buttons or links inside, then clicking on them will not work.

image_position.label: Image position
image_position.info: "Left" and "Right" positions apply to desktop devices only.

overlay-close.label: Click overlay to close
overlay-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user clicks on overlay.

esc-close.label: Press ESC to close
esc-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses ESC key.

f4-close.label: Press F4 to close
f4-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses F4 key.

heading.label: Heading
heading.default: Use this space to display a message

description.label: Description
description.default: Use this space to highlight a special promotion, newsletter sign-up incentive, or time-limited deal to capture attention.

description.label: Additional text
description.default: By clicking on the "Subscribe" button, I confirm my agreement with the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use

info_text.content: To display the icons, you need to fill in the links in "Theme settings > Social media".

heading.label: Heading
heading.default: Use this space to display a message

description.label: Description
description.default: Use this space to highlight a promo or limited-time offer.

button_action.label: Button action
button_action.info: Customer won’t see this notification again after clicking "Accept button". To limit banner displays when "Link" is selected, it is recommended to configure "Limit display" in the section settings.

heading.label: Heading
heading.default: Use this space to display a message

description.label: Description
description.default: Use this space to share important store updates, highlight promotions, welcome visitors to your site, or inform them about how you use data to improve their shopping experience.

button_action.label: Button action
button_action.info: Customer won’t see this notification again after clicking "Accept" button. To limit bar displays when "Link" is selected, it is recommended to configure "Limit display" in the section settings.

text_declined.default: Access has been denied due to age restrictions.

heading_orders.default: You Haven't Placed Any Orders Yet

text_orders.default: Your cart may be empty now, but let us help you fill it up with amazing products.

text_addresses.default: Add your shipping and billing addresses for next orders.

image.label: Overwrite image
image.info: The blog posts metafield can be connected to this setting to display the alternative image. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

media_color_scheme.label: Media color scheme
media_color_scheme.info: For the content placed over the image.

posts_name.label: Posts special naming
posts_name.info: Enter the name using the plural form.

featured_text.content: Applies only if at least one "Featured post" block is added.

featured_info_1.content: The featured post will be shown above the post list.

empty_cart_info.content: Hidden when the cart is empty.

text.label: Text
text.default: Use this space to provide an overview of your store’s shipping and delivery policies, giving customers essential information.

paragraph.content: To change collection descriptions or collection images, [edit your collections.](/admin/collections)

quick_filter_type.label: Quick filter type
quick_filter_type.info: Tag filtering reloads the collection page and resets current filters; combining tags ("OR" logic) isn’t available. Product type filtering supports "OR" logic without resetting current filters. Customize "Product type" filters in the Search and Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

color_scheme.label: Color scheme
color_scheme.info: The selected color scheme will apply if the collection has an image and the "Show collection image" setting is enabled.

image_products.label: Image for "Products" page
image_products.info: Image for automatically generated page with all products.

add_all_products.label: Add the "All products" tab at the start.

enable_total_selected.label: Enable total selected filters per type

enable_filtering.label: Enable filtering
enable_filtering.info: Customize filters with the Search and Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

filter_type.label: Desktop filter layout
filter_type.info: For tablet and mobile, the layout is always vertical.

enable_tags.label: Enable filtering
enable_tags.info: Customize filters with the Search and Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

info.content: The title and content of the current page will be shown. To show the desired page, assign the template to the page in the admin panel.

constrain_media_to_screen_height.label: Constrain media to desktop screen height

show_primary_media_on_page_load.label: Show primary media first on page load
show_primary_media_on_page_load.info: If disabled, the media item of the first or selected variant will be shown first.

gallery_info_text.label: Gallery info text
gallery_info_text.default: Use this space for model name, size, or special notes.

new_badge_days.label: Show period of new badge
new_badge_days.info: The number of days is counted from the product publish date.

show_custom_badges.label: Show custom badges
show_custom_badges.info: Need to add a metafield "custom.badges" of type "Single line text" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

overwrite_text.label: Overwrite text
overwrite_text.info: Leave the field blank to display the product description.

color_swatches_type.label: Color swatches type
color_swatches_type.info: Applies only to the "Pills" type for Color swatches, which are configured in "Theme settings > Color swatches".

color_swatches_info.content: If color values are not displayed in the color swatches, you can configure them through "Theme settings > Color swatches > Custom colors", or by using [category metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields).

option_popup_option_name.label: Option name
option_popup_option_name.info: Option name under which the button to open the popup will appear.

option_popup_page.label: Option popup page
option_popup_page.info: The content of the selected page will be used inside the popup.

type_inventory_info.label: Type inventory information
type_inventory_info.info: Displayed next to the last option in "Pills" type.

paragraph_variant_picker.content: In this block, variant picker is forcibly disabled for products with over 250 variants, but the "Add to cart" button always stays synced with the main "Variant picker" block.

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift card products
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Gift card products can optionally be sent direct to a recipient along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

text_availability_notification.content: When a product is out of stock, a "Notify Me" button will appear next to the "Sold Out" button. Clicking it opens a form modal. Once submitted, the request is sent to the merchant's email.

note_availability_notification.content: Note: Automatic emails to customers are not supported — the merchant must manually contact customers when the product is back in stock.

show_share_pinterest.label: Pinterest
show_share_pinterest.info: Shown if the product has an image.

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

description.default: Use this block to add extra product details.

text.label: Text
text.default: Use this block to add extra product details.

page.label: Page
page.info: The content of the selected page will be used inside the popup.

paragraph__1.content: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

paragraph__2.content: Products will be displayed if they are not yet added to the cart.

paragraph_1.content: Extra options collect customization details that are saved with the product when added to the cart.

content_heading.default: Here can be your newsletter title

newsletter_text.label: Additional text
newsletter_text.default: By subscribing, you understand and agree to our Privacy Policy.

paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

page.label: Page
page.info: Note that adding a contact page will not display the contact form. The contact form is a separate section.

product_list.label: Products
product_list.info: The product list takes priority over the collection.

text_about_products.content: If no products or collection are selected, all products in the store will be available for the section.

text_about_dynamic.content: If there are more than 50 products in the store or selected collection, products will be dynamically loaded.

button_link.info: If empty, the link will be auto-generated based on the selected sorting mode.

sort.label: Sort products by:
sort.info: "Featured" and "Best selling" do not work when products are selected using the "Products" setting.

layout.label: Layout
layout.info: In the "Row" layout, blocks will expand to the full width of the screen and may move to a second row when they exceed the container’s width.

horizontal_alignment.info: In the case of "Row" layout, this setting will apply only as text alignment.

heading.default: This section should introduce the topic in a compelling way that captures attention and motivates to keep reading.

text.default: This section should be structured in a clear, organized, and thoughtfully planned manner, making it easy for the reader to follow along at every step, while also ensuring they fully grasp the overall purpose, key messages, and the practical value the content is intended to deliver.

heading.default: This is where you highlight key information

description.default: Use this space to describe what this slide presents, such as a product, offer, or important update.

header_overlay.info: Only for the first section on the page. A color scheme with a dark background is recommended for section.

heading.default: This is where your message goes

description.default: Use this space to give context to the image or video, explaining what it represents and why it matters.

title.label: Title
title.info: If not set, default collection name will be used.

layout_type.info: To get the best viewing experience, "Grid" layout is adapted for using within the even number of cards.

enable_hover_animation.label: Enable hover animation
enable_hover_animation.info: On hover, an image, and a button will be displayed.

items_per_row.label: Cards per row
items_per_row.info: If you set more cards than the selected value, this section will be displayed as a slider.

card_description.default: Here, you can provide a short description of this column’s focus — whether it’s a product, service, value, or promotion.

paragraph__1.content: Here, you can choose products in two ways: they can either be automatically loaded from the selected collection or manually selected in the 'Products' field.

products_to_show.label: Products to show
products_to_show.info: Applies to products from the selected collection.

products.label: Products
products.info: If not set, products will be automatically loaded from the selected collection in default collection order.

enable_media.label: Enable media
enable_media.info: If disabled, banner will be displayed with color background.

image_mobile.label: Image for laptops and mobile devices

media_ratio.label: Promo banner ratio
media_ratio.info: Applied only for laptops and mobile devices, for desktop it will be adapted to products grid.

paragraph__3.content: For enabling the autoplay, the minimum number of slides must be not less than "Slides per view" and "Slides per view on mobile" values.

content_heading.default: This Is Where Your Key Statement Goes — Keep It Short and Focused

content_description.default: Explains the background or story behind the image, helping the viewer understand its deeper significance or purpose.

section_ratio_info.label: Desktop section aspect ratio
section_ratio_info.info: For mobile devices adapts to the content.

img_as_cursor.label: Use image as a cursor
img_as_cursor.info: Functionality is available only on desktop devices. On mobile, the image will be displayed in a static position.

content_vertical_alignment.info: Doesn't apply when "Adapt to content" section aspect ratio selected.

objects_order.label: Content order
objects_order.info: Only for the case when "Use image as a cursor" is disabled.

banner_heading.default: Showcase Your Message Here — Use This Heading to Introduce the Content Visually Supported by the Image

heading.default: Add a powerful message right here

description.default: Use this space to introduce your brand, tell your story, or highlight a featured product collection.

header__images.info: Displays the product’s secondary image or the image from the metafield "custom.highlight_image" of type "File". [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

list_description.default: Use this space to share info about featured items, their benefits, or highlight bestsellers here.

ticker_link.label: Link
ticker_link.info: If set, the entire animated area will be clickable.

description.label: Description
description.default: Use this space to introduce your brand or showcase current offers. Add a message that informs, welcomes, or inspires your visitors.

group_name.label: Group name
group_name.info: You can specify a country or city. The blocks will be grouped by this field.

location_info.label: Contact information
location_info.default:
Contact information goes here

Get in touch

enable_heading_group.label: Enable heading group
enable_heading_group.info: If the heading group is disabled, the heading will be displayed next to the tabs.

content_page.label: Page
content_page.info: The content of the selected page will be used.

richtext_content.label: Content
richtext_content.default:
Use this field to display any type of content, such as contact details, shipping information, or key benefits of your product or service.

Get in touch

collapsible_row_question.label: Question
collapsible_row_question.default: Use this space to ask a question

collapsible_row_answer.label: Answer
collapsible_row_answer.default: Use this space to provide a more informative response, explaining the topic in a way that is easy to understand while covering the key points that customers need to know.
